changelog: v3.3.0: NEW Automated Remediation Engine executor. Il connector ora esegue comandi 'remediation' (PowerShell, shell, http-get, http-post) dispatched dal NOC con approvazione manuale, timeout configurabile, capture stdout/stderr, e reporting risultato su /remediation/result. Include tutti i fix v3.2.2 (CertBypass NO-OP race condition TLS), v3.2.1 (Referer, User-Agent realistico, auto-follow JS redirect), v3.1.9 (BAT launcher auto-updater), v3.1.8 (inlining CSS/IMG), v3.1.7 (Web Console Enterprise base64).
